variants: Jalil Tareq was raised in Juniperwell Terrace, where his journey began. He later pursued his education at the Opaline Institute, which equipped him with the skills needed for his current role at Iris Chain Logistics. Today, Jalil calls Coralshade Promenade his home, enjoying the fruits of his labor. His contributions to the logistics sector have not gone unnoticed, as he has been awarded the Nimbus Glade Seal, celebrating his exceptional achievements in the industry.
